# Production Extension README

This extension turns the previous autonomous-ad-factory material into a more complete build plan.

## What was added

- Full control-plane model.
- Product truth and claim graph.
- Voice-of-customer pipeline.
- Competitive intelligence workflow.
- Angle/offer engine.
- Channel router.
- Creative and landing-page factories.
- Static/video AI creative pipeline.
- Platform adapter current-state notes.
- Payload examples.
- Event taxonomy.
- Measurement stack.
- Experiment decision rules.
- Budget and risk controls.
- Policy engine.
- Privacy/consent rules.
- Agent eval harness.
- Model routing and cost plan.
- Database schema.
- Backend/frontend/service specs.
- Production SOP.
- Failure/incident response.
- Legal review template.
- Capstone build spec.
- Mock reference implementation.

## How to use it

1. Read `81_full_autonomous_ad_factory_master_blueprint.md`.
2. Build the claim bank from `120_sample_claim_bank.csv`.
3. Use the reference implementation under `reference_implementation/` to run a mock pipeline.
4. Replace mock adapters with real platform adapters only after the policy/eval/budget systems pass.
5. Treat all outputs as drafts until approval rules are satisfied.

## Operating law

Automate production. Constrain claims. Measure reality. Escalate risk.
